events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: block/brick laying, ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded. TMS 402/602 governs masonry. Ladder reinforcement (joint reinforcement) spacing requirements. If spacing exceeded, non-compliant. Work is rough-complete. Decision fail. Risk medium/high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Value maybe spacing measurement not given, so 0. Confidence high. Findings and actions.

  "findings": [
    "Ladder-type joint reinforcement spacing exceeds the maximum interval required by TMS 402/602 for the wall assembly.",
    "Exceeding joint reinforcement spacing reduces crack control and may compromise the intended horizontal reinforcement contribution."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify required ladder reinforcement spacing against approved drawings/specifications and TMS 402/602.",
    "Install additional ladder reinforcement at the missing/elevated courses to meet the specified spacing before the wall is closed out.",
    "Inspect installed courses for proper embedment, lap, and continuity of joint reinforcement."
  ],
  "rationale": "Joint reinforcement spacing is a prescriptive requirement under TMS 402/602; exceeding the specified spacing is a non-compliant installed condition at rough-complete stage and must be corrected before closure.",

    "TMS 402/602, Building Code Requirements for Masonry Structures, joint reinforcement provisions",
    "TMS 402/602, prescriptive reinforcement spacing requirements"
  ]
